mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT 1 FROM file_meta fm
INNER JOIN file_dataset_relation fdr ON fm.id = fdr.file_id AND fdr.dataset_id = #{datasetId}
AND fm.file_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{fileName}, '%')
AND fm.file_type = #{fileType}
AND fm.tags @> CAST(( '[' ||
#{tagId}
|| ']' ) AS jsonb)
AND CAST(fm.metadata AS text) ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{val}, '%') AND fm.metadata ->> #{key} ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{val}, '%')
AND fm.created_at >= CAST(#{startDate} AS TIMESTAMP)
AND fm.created_at <= CAST(#{endDate} AS TIMESTAMP)
LIMIT 10000 ) t

SELECT fm.id, fm.file_name, fm.file_type, fm.file_path, fm.file_size, fm.tags, fm.metadata, fm.created_at FROM file_meta fm
INNER JOIN file_dataset_relation fdr ON fm.id = fdr.file_id AND fdr.dataset_id = #{datasetId}
AND fm.file_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{fileName}, '%')
AND fm.file_type = #{fileType}
AND fm.tags @> CAST(( '[' ||
#{tagId}
|| ']' ) AS jsonb)
AND CAST(fm.metadata AS text) ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{val}, '%') AND fm.metadata ->> #{key} ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{val}, '%')
AND fm.created_at >= CAST(#{startDate} AS TIMESTAMP)
AND fm.created_at <= CAST(#{endDate} AS TIMESTAMP)
ORDER BY fm.id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE file_meta SET tags = ( SELECT jsonb_agg( CASE WHEN (t#>>'{}')::bigint = #{oldId} THEN #{newId}::jsonb ELSE t END ) FROM jsonb_array_elements(tags) AS t ) WHERE tags @> CAST(#{oldId} AS TEXT)::jsonb
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO file_meta (id, file_name, file_path, file_size, file_type, tags, metadata) VALUES ( #{id}, #{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{fileType}, #{tags}::jsonb, #{metadata}::jsonb )
